creator: dpchrist@holgerdanske.com
text:
Hangs at:

    ports.txz		25%


Checksum of USB flash drive has changed again -- does the installer write to the USB flash drive?

    2016-09-25 14:45:52 root@cd2533 ~
    # dd if=/dev/sdc count=1350917 | sha256sum -b
    1350917+0 records in
    1350917+0 records out
    bd159b85486322febe992226bbec9c86d96d70dd1e5a8b7c6f0bb9d29eb50df3 *-
691669504 bytes (692 MB) copied, 42.989 s, 16.1 MB/s


I will try again with another USB flash drive.
